archetype: Archetype 1: Organic & Earthy (Adapted for premium medical trust)
design_philosophy: A premium, accessible, and high-trust healthcare experience. Focuses on clarity, empathy, and speed to conversion. Uses generous whitespace, high-contrast typography, and soft curves to reduce clinical anxiety while maintaining authority.

scales.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-6xl font-bold tracking-tight text-[#0F4C81] leading-[1.1]
scales.h2: text-3xl sm:text-4xl lg:text-5xl font-bold tracking-tight text-[#0F4C81] leading-[1.2]

header.classes: fixed top-0 w-full z-50 backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/90 border-b border-slate-100 transition-all duration-300

hero_section.layout: Split 50/50 layout. Left side text content, right side hero image with floating trust badge (e.g., '15+ Years Experience').
buttons: Secondary: Outline/Ghost button for View Services

trust_badges.layout: Horizontal banner below hero, subtle background (#F8FAFC), 4-5 key metrics/badges using lucide-react icons (e.g., Award, ShieldCheck, Users, Clock).

about_clinic.layout: Image left (rounded-3xl), Content right. Highlight 'Quality Healthcare for Every Family' in Andheri West.

services_grid.card_style: Flat background, 1px border (#E5E7EB), icon in circle with teal tint, hover lift (-translate-y-2) and shadow-hover.

doctor_profile.layout: Card layout. High-quality portrait image. Details below. Social links/credentials. Use 'Consult Now' button.

appointment_form.style: Use Shadcn UI components (Input, Select, Button). Layout in a bordered card.
appointment_form.behavior: Frontend-only validation, triggers Shadcn Dialog (Confirmation Popup) on submit.

why_choose_us.layout: Bento Grid Mode A (Tetris Grid). Mix 2-col and 1-col spans for visual tension. Highlight tech, care, environment.

patient_testimonials.layout: Carousel (using Framer Motion or Shadcn Carousel). Soft teal-tinted background for the section.

gallery_masonry.layout: CSS Columns or Masonry grid. Images zoom on hover.
gallery_masonry.behavior: Clicking image opens Framer Motion Lightbox or Shadcn Dialog showing full image.

contact_section.layout: 2 Columns. Left: Address, Email, Phone, Timings. Right: Google Maps embedded iframe for 'Andheri West, Mumbai'.

footer.layout: 4 Columns: Brand info, Quick Links, Services, Contact. Generous padding (py-20).

floating_whatsapp.style: Fixed bottom-right, z-50, green background (#25D366), lucide-react MessageCircle icon, pulsing animation.

motion_and_interactions.page_load: Staggered fade-up (Framer Motion) for Hero section elements.
motion_and_interactions.scroll: WhileInView animations for sections (opacity 0 to 1, y: 20 to 0).
motion_and_interactions.hover: Buttons have scale-105 effect, cards elevate with shadow.
motion_and_interactions.accessibility: Respect prefers-reduced-motion in Framer Motion (use useReducedMotion hook).

hero.description: Modern medical clinic interior for Hero background/image

doctor.description: Confident South Asian male doctor in white coat

instructions_to_main_agent: CRITICAL: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a 'data-testid' attribute (e.g., data-testid='book-appointment-btn').
CRITICAL: Create 'src/data/clinicConfig.js' to store ALL text content, service lists, doctor details, and image URLs. Import from this file into the React components.
Use 'framer-motion' for all animations, stagger effects, scroll reveals, and the masonry gallery lightbox.
Form must be functional frontend-only using Shadcn UI. Show a Shadcn Dialog confirmation upon submission.
Do not use Inter for headings. Apply 'Outfit' font for headings and 'Manrope' for body. Update tailwind.config.js accordingly.
Ensure contrast ratios are met. The Deep Blue (#0F4C81) and Teal (#14B8A6) must pop beautifully against the clean white background.
For the Sticky Nav, ensure it has a z-index of 50 and proper backdrop-blur.
Ensure the layout is completely mobile-responsive (mobile-first approach).
The gallery should be implemented as a Masonry layout using Tailwind columns (e.g., columns-1 md:columns-2 lg:columns-3) or an actual masonry library/framer-motion grid.
